_comment: Baseline for audit-text-html-ratio.mjs. Numbers must only DECREASE — this gate is a ratchet. 2026-04-28 update: weekly-employers lowered 70→10 after expanding companyCityFrontalier (5th paragraph on contract clauses), adding a per-page methodology section and two extra FAQ entries (telework + SBFI/SEFRI title equivalence) to build-plugins/weeklyEmployersPlugin.ts. Local partial build showed 80→1 offenders, leaving ample headroom under the new 10 cap; total dropped from 1600→1530 to reflect the same 60-page improvement. Earlier (same day) bumped to absorb the SPA-style job-card refactor (commit affb542cc) which added Tailwind markup to job-listing SEO pages without proportional text content increase. Follow-up TODO: add commuter-context prose to the SPA-style card template in build-plugins/jobsSeoPagesPlugin.ts to bring the ratio back above 10% — the job-board: 830 line stays a temporary unblock until that lands.
